families.name: basics
families.description: Minimal perception fixtures used for parser and validator smoke coverage.

families.name: discrete
families.description: Discrete POMDP and HMM-style active inference fixtures.

unsupported_step_reasons.11: Continuous fixtures use non-POMDP matrices that current code renderers intentionally skip for v1.9.
unsupported_step_reasons.12: No executable script is expected when Step 11 is profiled as unsupported for continuous fixtures.

unsupported_step_reasons.11: Hierarchical fixtures require cross-level matrix semantics that current POMDP renderers intentionally skip for v1.9.
unsupported_step_reasons.12: No executable script is expected when Step 11 is profiled as unsupported for hierarchical fixtures.

families.name: structured
families.description: Structured factor graph and posterior fixtures.

families.name: gridworld
families.description: Gridworld POMDP fixture used for cross-framework acceptance checks.

families.name: scaling-study
families.description: PyMDP scaling-study fixtures, sampled conservatively for acceptance.
